response.justification: The candidate lacks critical required qualifications: no evidence of C programming for UNIX/embedded systems, no Linux kernel modification experience, no exposure to embedded networking or security technologies like MACsec or 802.1X, and no Japanese language proficiency — all of which are non-negotiable for this role.
strengths: Strong full-stack development experience across multiple languages and platforms
Demonstrated expertise in open-source projects and developer tooling
Proven ability to work in complex, distributed systems with high performance requirements
concerns: No experience with C in UNIX/embedded environments or Linux kernel development
No knowledge of required security protocols (MACsec, 802.1X, etc.) or switch firmware
Cannot communicate in Japanese, a mandatory requirement for the role

key_factors.factor: Absence of network security domain knowledge
